text:
A wise owl perched on a willow branch. She'd seen a lot of things.

Once upon a moonlit night, she heard the chirping of kittens. They chased straw hats.

"Ah," the owl thought. "What fun."

So she flew down and played tag. They howled!

She flew away.

The next dawn moose snuffled oats. Did she see kittens?

Maybe. She might just tease them some.

So an owl owl did.

They laughed.

Late. Owls didn Friends.


Maybe. Owls love milk.


So owl owl drank.

So much.

They went to bed.
